creator: kdeguchi@sz.tokoha-u.ac.jp
text:
My environment is FreeBSD 10.0 STABLE r264031M.

Plsese add this line to Makefile.

CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--enable-schemas-compile --enable-schemas-install


complile log as follows:

gmake[4]: Entering directory `/tmp/usr/ports/multimedia/gnome-mplayer/work/gnome-mplayer-1.0.8'
  GEN      apps.gnome-mplayer.preferences.enums.xml
  GEN      apps.gnome-mplayer.preferences.gschema.valid
  GEN      apps.gecko-mediaplayer.preferences.gschema.valid

gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/tmp/usr/ports/multimedia/gnome-mplayer/work/gnome-mplayer-1.0.8'

snip

fi
